allow: Bash(node -e "const lib = require\('c:/Users/rizhi/Desktop/GROK/public/packages/Bio/files/monomer-libraries/HELMCoreLibrary.json'\); const rna = lib.filter\(m => m.polymerType === 'RNA'\); const summary = {}; for \(const m of rna\) { const key = m.monomerType + '|' + \(m.naturalAnalog||''\); \(summary[key] = summary[key] || []\).push\(m.symbol\); } for \(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(summary\)\) console.log\(k, '=>', v.length, ':', v.slice\(0,15\).join\(','\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const lib = require\('c:/Users/rizhi/Desktop/GROK/public/packages/Bio/files/monomer-libraries/HELMCoreLibrary.json'\); const want = ['fR','mR','Sp','sP','m1A','m6A','5meC','m5C','Rsp','Ssp','dR','RGNA','LR','en','bp']; for \(const m of lib\) { if \(m.polymerType !== 'RNA'\) continue; if \(want.includes\(m.symbol\) || /^\(mR|fR|mr|fr\)$/.test\(m.symbol\)\) { console.log\(m.symbol, '|', m.monomerType, '|', m.naturalAnalog, '|', m.name\); }}")

Bash(node -e "const lib = require\('c:/Users/rizhi/Desktop/GROK/public/packages/Bio/files/monomer-libraries/HELMCoreLibrary.json'\); for \(const m of lib\) { if \(m.polymerType==='RNA' && m.monomerType==='Backbone' && m.naturalAnalog==='r' && /^\(fR|mR|fr|mr|aR|m2|fl2|fl|oMe|2|moe|me\)/.test\(m.symbol\)\) console.log\(m.symbol, '|', m.name\); }")

Bash(node -e "const lib = require\('c:/Users/rizhi/Desktop/GROK/public/packages/Bio/files/monomer-libraries/HELMCoreLibrary.json'\); for \(const m of lib\) { if \(['Rsp','Ssp','bp','m5C','m6A','fl2r','moe','p','r','d','A','C','G','U','T'].includes\(m.symbol\) && m.polymerType==='RNA'\) { console.log\(m.symbol, '|', m.monomerType, '|R-groups:', m.rgroups.map\(r=>r.label\).join\(','\)\); } }")
